10ScenicPointsInUI.evidence: world_runtime_store has 10 explore points from world_seed_v1.js. buildExploreRenderTree produces scenicLayers[10]. Each point has id, name, kicker, subtitle, themeColor. Decorative groups (origin/journey/echo/climax/void) map correctly.

relicSystemVisibleState.evidence: 8 relics initialized. All have names, symbols, phenomena. discoverRelic() changes state from undiscovered→discovered. buildRelicRenderTree shows progress and grouped sections reflecting discovered state.

rightsCenterRealContent.evidence: 11 rights items (collectibles + coupons). buildRightsRenderTree has coupon and collectible sections. buildMerchantRenderTree shows 5 real merchant coupons with merchant names, descriptions, benefit values.

uiNotEmptyRealData.evidence: User world state tracks 10 total points. visitPoint() updates visited count and journey progress. buildMyRenderTree reflects real relic/point/rights counts. All 5 page builders produce non-null renderTrees.

colorsUnifiedV59TokenSystem.evidence: Global visual injector provides 21 palette colors, 8 spacing tokens, 7 typography sizes, 5 card styles, 3 glow rules. injectVisualTokens() stamps renderTrees with V5.9 metadata. enforceTokenCompliance() detects non-approved colors.

renderTreeDrivesAllPages.evidence: 5 page builders (buildExploreRenderTree, buildMyRenderTree, buildRightsRenderTree, buildRelicRenderTree, buildMerchantRenderTree) all produce renderTrees. All 5 pages (index, my, rights, relic, merchant/coupons) updated to consume from world_runtime_store.

modulesCreated.purpose: Unified runtime data source. Loaded from world_seed_v1.js. Provides points, relics, rights stores + renderTree builders for all 5 pages.
V5.9 visual token system. Force-injects palette, spacing, typography, card system, glow rules into all renderTrees. Enforces token compliance.
Safe accessor for world_runtime_store and visual_injector from any page context.

pagesUpdated: pages/index/index.js — Added store accessor, store point injection into buildPageData
pages/my/index.js — Replaced mock data with world_runtime_store buildMyRenderTree
pages/rights/index.js — Replaced mock data with world_runtime_store buildRightsRenderTree
pages/relic/index.js — Replaced mock data with world_runtime_store buildRelicRenderTree
pages/merchant/coupons/index.js — Replaced mock data with world_runtime_store buildMerchantRenderTree

initializationOrder.step5: setData on page → store.buildXxxRenderTree() → injectVisualTokens → WXML
initializationOrder.rule: ALL pages read from world_runtime_store only. No direct JSON access in UI.
